zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Vipont Lord of Appleby於大約1212年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德布盧加姆 卡素時，他的父親Robert de Vieuxpont50歲，母親Idonea de Builly39歲。他於1234年之前與Sibyl de Ferrers在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德布盧加姆 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1235年在英國維斯特莫藍德被列為sheriff of westmorland。他去世於1241年7月25日之前在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Vipont Lord of Appleby于大约1212年出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德布盧加姆 卡素时，他的父亲Robert de Vieuxpont50岁，母亲Idonea de Builly39岁。他于1234年之前与Sibyl de Ferrers在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德布盧加姆 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1235年在英国維斯特莫藍德被列为sheriff of westmorland。他去世于1241年7月25日之前在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vipont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vieuxpont in Calvados, France.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Vipont Lord of Appleby was born about 1212, in Brougham Castle, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Vieuxpont, was 50 and his mother, Idonea de Builly, was 39. He married Sibyl de Ferrers before 1234, in Brougham Castle, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1235, at the age of 24, his occupation is listed as sheriff of westmorland in Westmorland, England. He died before 25 July 1241, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Vipont Lord of Appleby est né environ 1212, à Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Vieuxpont, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Idonea de Builly, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Sibyl de Ferrers avant 1234, à Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1235, à l’âge de 24 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of westmorland à Westmorland, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 25 juillet 1241, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Vipont Lord of Appleby um 1212 in Brougham Castle, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Vieuxpont 50 und seine Mutter Idonea de Builly 39. Er hat vor 1234 in Brougham Castle, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom Sibyl de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1235, als er 24 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of westmorland in Westmorland, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 25. Juli 1241 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Vipont Lord of Appleby è nato il circa 1212 nel Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Vieuxpont, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Idonea de Builly, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Sibyl de Ferrers prima del 1234, nel Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1235, all'età di 24 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of westmorland nel Westmorland, England. Morì prima del 25 luglio 1241, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Vipont Lord of Applebyが約1212年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドブロウアム カストルで生まれた時，父Robert de Vieuxpontは50歳，母Idonea de Buillyは39歳であった。1234年以前にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドブロウアム カストルでSibyl de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1235年，24歳の時，イギリスウエストモーランドでの職業はsheriff of westmorlandと記録されている。彼は1241年7月25日以前にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Vipont Lord of Appleby(이)가 대략 1212년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 브루그함 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Vieuxpont(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Idonea de Builly(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1234년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 브루그함 카스틀에서 Sibyl de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1235년, 24세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 sheriff of westmorland이었다. 그는 1241년 7월 25일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Vipont Lord of Appleby nasceu aproximadamente 1212, em Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Vieuxpont, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Idonea de Builly, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibyl de Ferrers antes 1234, em Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1235, com 24 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of westmorland em Westmorland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 25 de julho de 1241, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Vipont Lord of Appleby родился около 1212 г. в местности броугам кастл, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Vieuxpont было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Idonea de Builly, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibyl de Ferrers перед 1234 г. в местности броугам кастл, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1235 году, в возрасте 24 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of westmorland в местности вестморланд, Англия. Он умер перед 25 июля 1241 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Vipont Lord of Appleby nació aproximadamente 1212, en Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Vieuxpont, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Idonea de Builly, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Sibyl de Ferrers antes de 1234, en Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1235, a la edad de 24 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of westmorland en Westmorland, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 25 de julio de 1241, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
